briefdescription.para: Get the ACPI HID for a node.

parameterdescription.para: DTS node identifier

simplesect.para: The HID of the ACPI node

briefdescription.para: Get the ACPI UID for a node if one exist.

parameterdescription.para: DTS node identifier

simplesect.para: The UID of the ACPI node else NULL if does not exist

briefdescription.para: check whether the node has ACPI HID property or not

parameterdescription.para: DTS node identifier

simplesect.para: 1 if the node has the HID, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: check whether the node has ACPI UID property or not

parameterdescription.para: DTS node identifier

simplesect.para: 1 if the node has the UID, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: IO mapped Resource type.
Memory mapped Resource type.
Unknown Resource type.
Init legacy interrupt routing table information from ACPI.

detaileddescription.para: Currently assume platform have only one PCI bus.

parameterdescription.para: the hardware id of the ACPI child device
the unique id of the ACPI child device. The uid can be NULL if only one device with given hid present in the platform.

simplesect.para: return 0 on success or error code

briefdescription.para: Retrieve a legacy interrupt number for a PCI device.

parameterdescription.para: the BDF of endpoint/PCI device

simplesect.para: return IRQ number or UINT_MAX if not found

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the current resource settings of a device.

parameterdescription.para: the name of the device
the list of acpi resource list

simplesect.para: return 0 on success or error code

briefdescription.para: Retrieve possible resource settings of a device.

parameterdescription.para: the name of the device
the list of acpi resource list

simplesect.para: return 0 on success or error code

briefdescription.para: Free current resource list memory which is retrieved by acpi_current_resource_get().

parameterdescription.para: the list of acpi resource list

simplesect.para: return 0 on success or error code

briefdescription.para: Parse resource table for a given resource type.

parameterdescription.para: the list of acpi resource list
the acpi resource type

simplesect.para: resource list for the given type on success or NULL

briefdescription.para: Retrieve ACPI device info for given hardware id and unique id.

parameterdescription.para: the hardware id of the ACPI child device
the unique id of the ACPI child device. The uid can be NULL if only one device with given HID present in the platform.

simplesect.para: ACPI child device info on success or NULL

briefdescription.para: Retrieve acpi device info from the index.

parameterdescription.para: the device index of an acpi child device

simplesect.para: acpi child device info on success or NULL

briefdescription.para: Parse resource table for irq info.

parameterdescription.para: the list of acpi resource list

simplesect.para: irq resource list on success or NULL

briefdescription.para: Parse resource table for irq info.

parameterdescription.para: the device object of the ACPI node
irq resource info

simplesect.para: return 0 on success or error code

briefdescription.para: Parse resource table for MMIO info.

parameterdescription.para: the device object of the ACPI node
MMIO resource info

simplesect.para: return 0 on success or error code

briefdescription.para: Parse resource table for identify resource type.

parameterdescription.para: the list of acpi resource list

simplesect.para: resource type on success or invalid resource type

briefdescription.para: Retrieve acpi table for the given signature.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the 4-character ACPI signature for the requested table
instance number for the requested table

simplesect.para: acpi_table pointer to the acpi table on success else return NULL

briefdescription.para: retrieve acpi MAD table for the given type.

parameterdescription.para: type of requested MAD table
pointer to the MAD table
number of instance for the requested table

simplesect.para: return 0 on success or error code

briefdescription.para: retrieve DMA remapping structure for the given type.

parameterdescription.para: type of remapping structure
pointer to the dmar id structure

simplesect.para: return 0 on success or error code

memberdef.argsstring: (enum AcpiDmarScopeType scope, ACPI_DMAR_DEVICE_SCOPE *dev_scope, union acpi_dmar_id *dmar_id, int *num_inst, int max_inst)
memberdef.name: acpi_drhd_get

briefdescription.para: retrieve acpi DRHD info for the given scope.

parameterdescription.para: scope of requested DHRD table
pointer to the sub table (optional)
pointer to the DHRD info
number of instance for the requested table
maximum number of entry for the given dmar_id buffer

simplesect.para: return 0 on success or error code

briefdescription.para: Retrieve IOAPIC id.

parameterdescription.para: IOAPIC id

simplesect.para: return 0 on success or error code

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the 'n'th enabled local apic info.

parameterdescription.para: the cpu number

simplesect.para: local apic info on success or NULL otherwise

briefdescription.para: invoke an ACPI method and return the result.

parameterdescription.para: the path name of the ACPI object
the list of arguments to be pass down
the ACPI result to be return

simplesect.para: return 0 on success or error code

briefdescription.para: system level poweroff by setting it to soft off.

simplesect.para: -EINVAL if the pm1_cnt address is not available.
